title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.557
text:
*8.557.  Annual report to the general assembly to be submitted, content. — The authority shall submit to the general assembly, annually, a report covering its operations and accomplishments, receipts and expenditures, assets and liabilities, a schedule of its bonds outstanding and any other information the authority deems necessary.
(L. 2002 S.B. 1191) 
Effective 6-07-02 
*Section terminates upon satisfaction of all outstanding notes and obligations.  See section 8.589.
